title: BCA Jobs 2026 – Apprentice
shortInfo: Regional Centre for Biotechnology Recruitment 2026: 14 Apprentice vacancies announced. Walk-in Interview from 08 June to 12 June 2026 for Biological Science, Engineering, IT, Management, Commerce/Arts, and Painter trades at the Regional Centre for Biotechnology.

basic_details.job_title: Regional Centre for Biotechnology Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 14 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Regional Centre for Biotechnology Recruitment 2026: 14 Apprentice vacancies announced. Walk-in Interview from 08 June to 12 June 2026 for Biological Science, Engineering, IT, Management, Commerce/Arts, and Painter trades at the Regional Centre for Biotechnology.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 14 years Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation as per Government of India rules for SC, ST, OBC, PwD and Ex-servicemen.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/ B.Sc in Life Sciences/ Biotech/ Microbiology, B.Com/ B.A., BE/ B.Tech in Civil/ Instrumentation/ Electrical, Graduate, Graduate/ BCA + Diploma in Computer Applications, 10th & 12th passed
qualification.details: Biological Science: B.Tech/ B.Sc in Life Sciences/ Biotech/ Microbiology Commerce/Arts: B.Com/ B.A. Engineering: Civil/ Instrumentation/ Electrical - BE/ B.Tech Management: Graduate Information Technology (IT): Graduate/ BCA + Diploma in Computer Applications Painter: 10th & 12th passed

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled from 08 June 2026 to 12 June 2026, with specific dates for different trade categories. Candidates should attend on the designated date for their respective trade.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from 10th & 12th passed to B.Tech/B.Sc in Life Sciences, B.Com/B.A., BE/B.Tech in Engineering disciplines, and Graduate/BCA with a Diploma in Computer Applications.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 14 years, and the maximum age limit is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Apprentice positions?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 13500 per month for the Apprentice posts.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The selection process is based on merit, determined by the marks secured by the candidates in their relevant degree or diploma course.

faq.question: What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Where is the Regional Centre for Biotechnology located?
faq.answer: The Regional Centre for Biotechnology is located in Faridabad, Haryana, with the pincode 121001.

faq.question: What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Apprentice positions are contractual in nature.

faq.question: How can I find the exact venue for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The exact venue details are typically provided in the official notification PDF. Candidates are advised to download and carefully read the notification for precise location and reporting instructions.
